decisions.decision: renderDefault hidden in absolute-positioned zero-height div
decisions.rationale: Preserves Sanity DnD sortable context while showing custom row layout

decisions.decision: trackingUrl only renders as link when starts with http/https
decisions.rationale: Defense in depth against javascript: protocol injection
Enables unit testing without Sanity Studio runtime
